title: physochlaina praealta
intro: Physochlaina praealta, also known as the 'yellow toadflax', is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Physochlaina praealta include its ability to relieve anxiety and insomnia, reduce inflammation and pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Physochlaina praealta can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
